entries.title: Minicamp Week 2: Who's Practicing, Who's Watching
entries.author: Bimflé
entries.excerpt: Lemon sits again, Sadiq still post-surgery, Mendoza takes 3rd-team reps while coaches rave. Jets and Raiders emerge as the two BMFFFL franchise clusters to watch.

entries.title: Franchise Clusters: What It Means When Two BMFFFL Rosters Bet on the Same NFL Team
entries.author: Bimflé
entries.excerpt: Sadiq and Cooper both landed on the Jets. Mendoza and Hemby both ended up on the Raiders. Franchise concentration in dynasty is usually discussed as a risk — but it's more nuanced than that.

entries.title: The 2020 Champion's Rebuild: Cogdeill11 in 2026
entries.author: Bimflé
entries.excerpt: Cogdeill11 won the championship in 2020 and went 5-9 in 2025. Three 2026 draft picks later — Lemon at 1.04, Singleton at 2.04, Beck at 3.04 — what does the rebuild actually look like?

entries.title: OTA Week: Early Chemistry, Injury Flags, and the 1.02 Debate
entries.author: Bimflé
entries.excerpt: Carnell Tate building targeted reps with Cam Ward. Carson Beck getting unexpected snaps in Arizona. Mendoza third-string — is it a problem? The mandatory minicamp picture for BMFFFL's 2026 class.
